overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic urban environment (Cyberpunk 2077), showing the player walking through a wide concrete alley with graffiti-covered walls, scattered debris, and neon signs visible in the distance. The clip ends with a sudden combat encounter where the player fires a handgun at an enemy near a building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide concrete alley with graffiti walls and scattered debris

events.description: camera tilts down from sky to face forward down the alley

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wide concrete alley toward the neon-lit district in the distance

entered.detail: tall brutalist concrete building with small windows and weathered facade
high concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
elevated highway or monorail track spanning across the alley
tall palm trees visible through the overpass structure
large illuminated billboard with purple and pink neon signage
modern street lamp with orange glowing top

segments.scene_description: The player walks down a wide, empty concrete alley flanked by a tall warehouse building on the left and a graffiti-covered wall on the right. The alley is littered with cardboard and trash. In the distance, an elevated highway overpass frames palm trees and bright neon billboards under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance with metal shutter door

events.description: camera whips sharply to the right to face an enemy combatant
player draws handgun and fires at enemy near the shutter door

agents.ego_description: engaging in close-quarters combat, drawing and firing a handgun at an enemy combatant

notable_agents.action: enemy combatant emerging from doorway near shutter door, being targeted

entered.detail: large closed metal roll-up shutter door with rust and weathering
large green industrial dumpster with trash bags nearby
thick concrete support pillar for the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The player suddenly turns right toward a building entrance with a metal shutter door. An enemy combatant appears near the doorway, and the player engages in combat, firing a handgun. The scene shifts from the open alley to a more enclosed area with a dumpster and concrete pillars.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective through a desolate urban alley that transitions from a wide, open corridor into a sudden, violent combat encounter. It begins by moving down a concrete path flanked by a tall warehouse and graffiti-covered walls, passing through scattered cardboard and trash. As the camera advances, the view opens toward an elevated highway overpass where palm trees and bright neon billboards stand out against an overcast sky. The scene then shifts abruptly as the player turns right toward a building entrance with a metal shutter door, narrowing the environment into an enclosed space featuring a dumpster and concrete pillars. Finally, the movement culminates in a sudden engagement as the player fires a handgun at an enemy appearing near the doorway.
